info.name: LiveMenu API
info.description: Complete API collection for LiveMenu: Authentication and Restaurant Management (CU-02)

item.name: Authentication

request.description: Creates a new user. Returns 201 on success, 400 if email already exists.

exec: console.log('Access token saved to collection variable');

request.description: Returns access_token, refresh_token, expires_in. Automatically saves access_token to collection variable for protected requests.
Protected endpoint. Requires valid JWT in Authorization header. Run Login first.
Revokes the session. Optional: send SESSION cookie if using cookie-based session.

item.description: Authentication endpoints: register, login, logout, and user info.

item.name: Restaurant Management (CU-02)

request.description: Lists all restaurants for the current user. Returns an array of restaurants. Requires authentication.
Gets a specific restaurant by ID. Returns 404 if restaurant not found or doesn't belong to user. Requires authentication.

Creates a new restaurant for the current user. Name is required (max 100 chars), description is optional (max 500 chars). Users can have multiple restaurants. Returns 201 on success, 400 if validation fails.
Updates a specific restaurant by ID. All fields are optional. If name is updated, slug is automatically regenerated. Returns 404 if restaurant not found or doesn't belong to user.
Deletes a specific restaurant by ID. Returns 204 on success, 404 if restaurant not found or doesn't belong to user.

item.description: Restaurant management endpoints (CU-02). Users can have multiple restaurants. All endpoints require authentication via Bearer token.
